claim_results.claim: Why it matters now The coherence equation $dC/dt = O \cdot G(1-C) - S \cdot C$ does not care that bronze statues were replaced by clinics; it only cares that the output sacrifices the future for a counterfeit present.
Bioarchaeological evidence from sites such as Amarna (Akhetaten) provides a window into a population under constant physiological stress.
The “Same God in Both Testaments” argument posits that divine actions in history are not arbitrary outbursts of temper, but the functioning of a moral and spiritual equation.
This can be modeled using a differential equation for coherence ($C$), which tracks the alignment of a system with its generative source.

The R² = 0.888 Lifespan Data and Civilizational Decay Statistical analysis of the lifespan data recorded in the early chapters of the biblical narrative provides an empirical basis for this entropy model.
Without $G$, the equation reduces to pure exponential decay.

The fact that any society survived the Bronze Age pandemonium is evidence of the $G$ term operating to preserve a “remnant.” The New Testament did not introduce grace; it unveiled the mechanism that had been preventing the $S$ term from zeroing out the human equation for millennia.
The mathematical reality of the coherence equation ($\frac{dC}{dt} = O \cdot G(1-C) - S \cdot C$) suggests that a system cannot optimize for $S$ (entropy) indefinitely.
The equation does not care that we replaced bronze statues with clinic waiting rooms; it only cares that the output of the system is the sacrifice of the future for the sake of a counterfeit present.
Any claim that turns a structural resemblance into a proven mechanism belongs here until the math, experiment, or textual chain can carry the weight.
Possible overstatement: language that sounds final should be read as a working model unless the article explicitly proves it.
Civilizations decay the same way individuals do — through accumulated decoherence on the same equation, $dC/dt = O \cdot G(1-C) - S \cdot C$.
Rigor & Kill Conditions Every claim is held to explicit falsification standards.

Kill if: The coherence equation does not generalize from individual decay to civilizational decay — i.e., societies do not, in measurable historical record, follow the same accumulated-$S \cdot C$ trajectory under prolonged decoherence that the lifespan-decay data ($R^2 = 0.888$) shows for individuals.
If civilizational collapse is structurally unrelated to the moral-physics equation, the framework fails at scale.
Every equation referenced in the paper, collected as a single index.

Coherence Equation — Civilizational Application $$\frac{dC}{dt} = O \cdot G \cdot (1 - C) - S \cdot C$$ $C$ = coherence of the society, $0$ = total decoherence, $1$ = total alignment. $O$ = openness, the population’s willingness to receive ordering. $G$ = grace, the divine input. $S$ = entropy / sin pressure.
Plain English: the same differential equation that governs a single soul governs a civilization.
$$\frac{dC}{dt} = -S \cdot C$$ Plain English: when $O \to 0$, the equation collapses to exponential decay.
The article’s civilizational claim: no society survives this regime.
The terminal nature of accumulated decoherence is not metaphor — it’s the equation under boundary conditions.
Used here as quantitative evidence that the narrative tracks an entropic process the equation predicts.
Grace (G) The negentropic divine input that prevents the equation from running to zero.
Article’s claim: $G$ is what kept any society alive through Bronze Age pandemonium.
Framework note: Entropy (physical frame) and Sin (theological frame) name the same dynamical quantity at the master-equation level.

Logos Field ($\chi$) The pervasive substrate of coherent reality — the framework's $\chi$ field; the Master-Equation field whose value is total system coherence. (Earlier drafts denoted this with $\Lambda$; that symbol is now reserved for the cosmological constant.) Field ≠ coupling : this entry locks the substrate sense.
